title: My Daughter Stole My Pie Recipe, Cut Me Out Of $1.2M. So I Served Pies With The Docket Number
description: I sold my cherry-red pickup and handed my grandmother's 100-year-old pie recipe to my daughter to launch her food truck, trusting a 30% profit share. She franchised without me, sold the brand for $1.2 million, and claimed the recipe was a gift. I sued for breach of contract, won a $360,000 settlement plus perpetual royalties, and now I run a rival truck serving 'Unkept Promise Pies' with every receipt stamped with the court docket number. #FamilyBetrayal #RecipeRevenge #UnkeptPromisePies
thumb_text: I TURNED HER $1.2M BETRAYAL INTO UNKEPT PROMISE PIES
pinned_comment: If your daughter took your grandma's pie recipe, cut you out of a $1.2M sale, and forged your signature, would you open a rival food truck and print the court docket on every receipt? Tell me your story in the comments.

thumb_lines.text: SHE FORGED MY SIGNATURE ON A QUARTER-MILLION DOLLAR LOAN
FBI AGENTS ENTERED THE BANK LOBBY
